title: Senior Frontend Developer at Cropin Asia Pacific Associates

jsonLd.title: Senior Frontend Developer at Cropin Asia Pacific Associates
jsonLd.description:
An exciting career opportunity awaits you at Cropin Asia Pacific Associates. We are on the lookout for a dedicated Frontend Developer to strengthen our Ranchi-based team.

About Cropin Asia Pacific Associates:
Cropin Asia Pacific Associates is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Work with agile methodologies including daily stand-ups and sprint planning
• Write and execute unit tests and integration tests
• Collaborate with cross-functional teams including product, design, and QA
• Write clean, maintainable, and well-documented code
• Integrate third-party APIs and services
• Optimize application performance and ensure high availability
• Design, develop and maintain scalable software applications

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• MBBS / MD / MS from recognized medical college
• 3-6 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Agile/Scrum
• Proficiency in REST APIs
• Proficiency in JavaScript
• Proficiency in TensorFlow
• Proficiency in Python
• Proficiency in Java
• Proficiency in React
• Proficiency in Microservices

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Company-sponsored certifications
• Employee stock options (ESOPs) for eligible roles
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Learning & development budget
• Referral bonus program
• Salary Range: 7 LPA - 15 LPA per annum

Location: Ranchi, Jharkhand, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Cropin Asia Pacific Associates!
